seed_problem: GF(q) node labeling with per-edge forbidden endpoint-sum sets; maximize satisfied edge weight
mutation: composite: finite-field edge CSP (endpoint-sum avoids forbidden set) coupled with a NON-LINEAR all-or-nothing hub-harmonization bonus (AND over a hub's incident edges); adversarial generator plants a hidden algebraic labeling amid conflict cliques and a big-bonus needle hub
title: Smart-City Lighting: Phase Harmonization over GF(q)
strategies: best constant phase (baseline): assign every controller the single phase c that clears the most edge weight
per-node greedy best-response: sweep controllers, each picks the phase clearing the most incident edge weight given neighbours
hub-aware local search: node best-response whose score folds in the all-or-nothing hub bonuses, with seeded restarts to escape conflict-clique local optima
algebraic recovery: try to reconstruct the planted GF(q) labeling that simultaneously clears spine edges and harmonizes planted hubs
